scripts.build:packages: pnpm --filter @sibermas/shared-types build && pnpm --filter @sibermas/schemas build && pnpm --filter @sibermas/constants build && pnpm --filter @sibermas/api-client build && pnpm --filter @sibermas/hooks build
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @sibermas/schemas test 2>/dev/null; pnpm --filter @sibermas/api-client test 2>/dev/null; pnpm --filter web test 2>/dev/null
